prompt: {"task":"editorial website hero design reference","output":"single 16:9 horizontal image, photographic editorial quality, color-graded film still feel, subtle 35mm grain, no watermark, no signature, no captions outside the composition","hard_constraints":["DO NOT use a conventional website hero layout","NO left-text / right-image split","NO centered headline + subhead + two buttons","NO gradient blobs, glowing nodes, neon-on-black, holographic gradients, abstract orbs, 'Powered by GPT' badges, agentic decoration, futuristic-sci-fi panel HUDs, neural-network illustrations, robotic hands, brain icons","NO Accenture/Deloitte stock-photo grid look, no four-quadrant framework, no handshake imagery, no team-pointing-at-screens","Treat this like a single page from Monocle magazine or Kinfolk that happens to function as a website hero"],"business_context":{"brand":"PERSEID ECHO CREATIONS","category":"An AI Solutions Practice. Operator-led AI agents and automations for 10-100 person operations","audience":"SMB owners and operators past the should-we-use-AI phase; they evaluate vendors by whether the person sounds like they have run an operation","voice":"Bold. Declarative. Premium. Short sentences. Concrete nouns. Banned words: transform, unlock, leverage, synergy, next-generation, cutting-edge, world-class. No em dashes."},"composition":{"layout":"asymmetric editorial. Subject crop anchored to the lower-left third. Upper-right two-thirds is quiet negative space where the headline lives. Reads as one photograph, not as a layout.","focal_point":"A man's hand and forearm in a rolled-cuff white oxford shirt, mid-motion with a black ballpoint pen, marking up a printed A4 spreadsheet on a heavy wooden desk. Beside it: a closed matte-black 14-inch laptop, a small ceramic mug of black coffee, a stack of two leather-bound notebooks. No face, no head. Hands are the operator's hands.","camera":"35mm-equivalent at f/2.8, slight three-quarter overhead angle from camera-left, shallow depth of field, anamorphic compression, focus pinned to the pen tip and the paper grain","lighting":"late golden hour, hard directional window light raking from camera-left, soft shadow falloff to the right, warm 4200K color temperature, light catches the cuff and the paper edge","setting":"spare ink-toned office. Plain plaster wall in the background tinted dark blue-navy. No art, no plants, no shelving, no decor.","negative_space":"upper-right two-thirds intentionally simple - the dark plaster wall holds a soft shadow gradient from upper-right (darkest) to lower-left - left empty for the headline"},"ux_elements_to_render_inside_the_image":{"top_left_wordmark":"text reading 'PERSEID ECHO CREATIONS' in small all-caps Poppins SemiBold, letter-spacing 0.20em, in paper-white #F6F6F4 at 12px optical size, sitting at the top-left margin","top_right_nav":"four small nav items in matching small caps Poppins SemiBold, paper-white #F6F6F4 at 70 percent opacity, reading exactly: 'APPROACH   SERVICES   ABOUT   CONTACT'","headline":"large Poppins SemiBold, very tight tracking at -0.03em, three short lines stacked upper-right, in paper-white #F6F6F4. Exact copy, three lines: line 1 'Built.' line 2 'Not pitched.' line 3 'Not promised.' - periods exactly as written, no em dashes","accent_move":"a single 4px-thick persimmon #FF6A2A horizontal underline of exactly 60px length sitting directly under the third line, flush left to the headline. ONLY chromatic-pop move in the frame.","meta_line":"directly below the underline, small caps Poppins SemiBold in paper-white #F6F6F4 at 60 percent opacity, reading exactly: 'AN AI SOLUTIONS PRACTICE / EST. 2026'","cta":"a single ghost button positioned lower-right of the frame: 1px paper-white #F6F6F4 stroke at 40 percent opacity, no fill, 14px label reading exactly 'Start a Conversation', with a small right-pointing arrow glyph at the end","corner_index":"bottom-left tiny mono caps Poppins SemiBold at 50 percent opacity reading exactly: 'INDEX / 01 - PRACTICE'"},"palette":{"dominant":"deep ink navy #0D1321 plaster wall, warm sepia-paper desktop tones, white shirt cuff, black coffee, matte black laptop","primary_text_color":"#F6F6F4 paper-white","accent":"#FF6A2A persimmon used ONCE only, as the small underline beneath the third headline line. Approx 1 percent of pixels.","forbidden":"no teal, no green, no blue saturation above navy ink, no second orange, no pastels"},"typography_direction":{"display":"Poppins SemiBold, geometric sans, tight tracking, operator-grade","meta":"Poppins SemiBold small caps with wide letter-spacing for tags and index marker"},"surface_treatment":"subtle 35mm film grain at 6 percent, slight vignette darker upper-right corner, no chromatic aberration, no lens flare, no bokeh artifacts","forbid_in_image":["any text not explicitly listed above","any human face or head","any logo or brand visible on objects in scene","any decor not specified (no plants, no books on shelves, no posters, no clocks)","any abstract decorative element (orbs, lines, particles, blobs, nodes, gradients)","any second accent color besides the single persimmon underline","any screen content on the laptop (laptop is closed)","any robotic, AI, futuristic, holographic, or sci-fi element"]}
